bead.title: config: LoadAndResolve canonical dispatch helper + unit tests
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides) (ResolvedConfig, error). The single canonical entry point used by all three production dispatch sites. Returns a usable ResolvedConfig even on load error (defaults + overrides) — caller decides whether to surface error.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/config/resolved.go (extend)
- cli/internal/config/resolved_test.go (extend)

Out-of-scope:
- Production callers (beads 7-9)

See TD-024 §config.LoadAndResolve.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestLoadAndResolve ./internal/config/... passes including: load-success path returns sealed ResolvedConfig with values from .ddx/config.yaml; load-error path returns sealed defaults-with-overrides plus the error. cd cli && go test ./internal/config/... passes.
